talks.position: New York Fed President / FOMC Vice Chair
talks.summary_zh: 指出通膨仍過高且風險偏向上行，政策必須應對能源、關稅與AI的影響，並透過資產負債表維持利率控制。

source_headlines.headline: Fed's Williams: Inflation remains far too high and risks lean toward inflation, though labor is stable; policy must respond to energy, tariffs and AI while the balance sheet maintains rate control under ample reserves.
